reviews.title: They felt comfortable, liked the color.
reviews.text:
I ordered these a 1/2 size larger, unfortunately they did not fit. Toes were right at edge.
I tried on one shoe and they felt very nice and soft yet stable at the same time.
I did return them due to the size.
I did not reorder because I have no way of know if I should go up a 1/2 size or a whole.
I’m sure they would be great shoes otherwise.

reviews.title: Enjoying walking again
reviews.text: I'm a size 10.5 on one foot and just barely over a 10 on the other foot. These fit well and work for both feet. I walk 1 to 2 miles a day and was having intense pain in my shins and feet. I did some research and ended up chosing this pair. While these shoes have not gotten rid of all the pain, they have alleviated most of it. It makes me confident that most of the pain from walking was in having the wrong footwear.

Mesh underlays help deliver better airflow to keep feet cool, while the stitched toe and solid rubber outsole increases durability to last longer.

title: Reebok Women's Ztaur Running Shoe
description: Reebok is an American-inspired global brand with a deep fitness heritage and a clear mission: To be the best fitness brand in the world. Not an easy one. But if there is one brand that can make it happen, it is Reebok, the brand that was fundamentally part of a fitness movement that forever changed the way we look at spandex and headbands. Sure, this is not the 1980s anymore – the world has moved on. But so has Reebok and it continues to be daring. Daring is knowing greatness doesn’t come from sameness. The past years have been characterized by a transformation from traditional sports to fitness. The three sides of the Reebok Delta, a symbol of change and transformation, represent the physical, mental and social changes that occur when individuals embrace the challenge of bettering themselves in the gym, in their lives and in the world.

reviews.text: I'll keep this pretty short: the shoe is serviceable; that's about it. It's neither particularly comfortable or uncomfortable; it's just a shoe with no outstanding qualities, pretty comparable in quality and feel to the $20 shoes you'd get at "the blue and yellow store". Mine ran on the small side, about a half size under, I would say, but they fit (without cramming my toes in), so I'll use them for outdoor work come spring and summer.

title: Brooks Mens Ghost 12 Running Shoe
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported

THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Neutral runners looking for a lightweight shoe and a smooth ride without sacrificing cushioning. Whether you’re a Ghost loyalist or are lacing one up for the first time, you’ll find plenty to like.
SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The neutral support type provides high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 11

SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: The newly engineered mesh and 3D Fit Print practically disappears on your foot with strategically placed stretch and structure.

reviews.title: I likes ‘em
reviews.text:
I’m not a runner so I can’t tell you what these or like for running in (though I’ve read good things about that), but I just wear them as every day, all around sneaks and they’re great for that. Great fit, cushy without making you feel like you’re going to fall over, and my previous pair of ghost 11s have held up nicely so I imagine these will too.

The instep on the shoes is just nylon mesh, so they’re anything but waterproof. They’re not even remotely water-resistant. But don’t expect that and I think you’ll probably be very happy with these shoes. Maybe not – different people’s feet are different and I’ve read a few reviews from people who aren’t thrilled with these. But for my part I’ve had a full range of shoes and sneakers over the years, some great and some not so much, and these are among the ones I’ve been happiest with. May you have a similar experience!

reviews.title: Over 900 miles, almost time for a new pair
reviews.text:
I work at a hospital, average 700+ miles a year at work, these have lasted 1.5 years but I wasn’t having to walk as much throughout Covid, things were a bit isolated in our hospital (largest university hospital in the Rocky Mountain region so we were busy but not spread out as usual).

Looking for my next pair since these are out of stock in my size.

Would love to see Brooks give health care workers a discount! But I’ll still pay since I know they are quality!

description: The Gel-Cumulus 22 running shoe is the recommended choice for neutral runners who want a soft and flexible daily trainer with a great fit. This update features a one-piece superior mesh combined with a seamless 3D printing structure that balances support and comfort around the foot, giving you an excellent fit right away. Flytefoam midsole is softer than the previous version for comfortable riding. Under the heel where the foot hits for the first time the ground has been redesigned to better insulate the impact. This new heel design has deeper grooves on the forefoot and a softer midsole foam to give you a soft drive. A durable AHAR rubber sole has been placed in key contact areas to help the Gel-Cumulus 22 shoe withstand a ton of miles.

reviews.title: My First Pair of Slip On Sneakers
reviews.text:
I own more pairs of shoes right now that at any time in my life. Part of the reason is because I am involved in more activities than I was in the past and I am thus in need of more types of shoes. My desire to diversify further led me to get my feet inside a pair of INZCOU Men's Non-Slip Gym Sneakers.

I’ve owned lots of pairs of sneakers, but this is the first time I have owned sneakers that do not have a tongue. Instead, these shoes are slip- on and that makes them a little easier to put on because you don’t have to reach down and pull the tongue out, like you commonly do with other shoes. Once they are slipped into place, you tie and are ready to go.

These shoes fit about as expected. The only small issue I had was with the arch support in one of the shoes- it seemed a little off and it hurt at first. But after walking around for a while, everything is fine now. And since these are the first pair of black sneakers I have ever owned, they match up nicely with my darker jeans. It’s a welcome change from the white sneakers I usually wear.

It’s good to have a variety of shoes and INZCOU sneakers have proven a good addition to my collection. I will still wear traditional sneakers, the type that doesn’t slip on. But I am happy to add this set of sneakers to my growing supply.

reviews.title: Light, neutral shoe
reviews.text: Saucony neutral running shoes are the only kind of running shoes that I have ever purchased. I had accepted that my feet can only tolerate running if I’m wearing the ugliest, clunkiest shoes. That’s changed with this pair. They are so lightweight and look nothing like my other pairs. I usually have to lace up my shoes differently, but haven’t had to do that with these. They’re so lightweight, but provide all of the support that I need

reviews.title: Lightweight and breathable
reviews.text:
Pros:
-Overall these shoes are pretty lightweight and breathable. Good amount of air flow with the mesh siding, however you need to take good care of these as the mesh can rip easier when you catch your foot on a step.
-I am a huge fan of saucony and have never had bad results with any of their shoes over the past 20 years. These shoes appear to be more of a basic model that I would expect to last about a year or 1 marathon season.
-No issues with blisters or rubbing.

Cons:
-There isn’t much grip/tread on the bottom of these shoes. For this reason, I don’t expect these to hold up as well as some of the other models of Saucony shoes I’ve had in the past.

reviews.title: True Fit
reviews.text: I have been wearing Saucony shoes for a few years now. They're one of the few shoe brands that I can order without trying on first. I can count on their shoes being true fit. This pair is no exception. I have wide feet and it's hard to find shoes that fit period! Let alone being able to order them online. These are running shoes and I am not a runner. I do find them to be less cushiony than I am used to. Maybe it's because they are running shoes. They are still comfortable to wear. I like the black and silver colors.

Cushioning - the underfoot feel and amount of impact protection provided by the compressing materials between the foot and running surface
Support - the level of pronation control built into the shoe, pronation is the inward rolling of the ankle through the gait cycle
Offset - the difference in height between the heel thickness and forefoot thickness of the shoe

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes
reviews.text: I like them very much, stylish, lots of compliments.  Color is perfect. (light Blue)

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: These shoes are lightweight, trendy & comfortable. Most shoes don't have all 3 for me. The price is great and are better than some of the tip brands out there. I definitely recommend these shoes. The quality is better than I expected.

reviews.title: Fit was expected
reviews.text: These are comparable to my name-brand sneakers. They fit well and are comfortable to wear, I'm very pleased with them and recommend them.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 9 Running Shoes
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
No-sew mesh upper:
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.

FLYTEFOAM Midsole Technology: Our FLYTEFOAM technology provides exceptional bounce back and responsiveness no matter the distance, utilizing organic super fibers to help reduce packing out that traditionally happens with softer, low density foams.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FLYTEFOAM Technology: Provides lightweight cushioning.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Love the fit and feel of these shoes. I always buy ASICS but decided to spend the extra money these after a friend recommended them. They are super light, very comfortable, and great to run in.

reviews.title: Great fit for narrow feet!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of ASICS. The narrow fit is perfect for my feet. Not keen on the color, but it was the only color available.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: I do t feel like it supports my arch enough

reviews.title: GT2000 are always the best!
reviews.text: GT2000 are always the best! I tried something new last time and came back to these! 17 years running!

reviews.title: Perfect fit for my wide foot
reviews.text: Perfect. Wide size fits my fore foot with enough room in toe box. Longer shoestrings to accommodate extra width. Good arch support. Heel not too wide or too high like many are. Best fitting shoe Ive had on my foot in a while.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 8 Mid Top Running Shoes
description: The GEL-VENTURE 8 MT (Mid-Top) running shoe is designed for the great outdoors. This version offers added ankle support that makes it an excellent choice for those seeking lasting stability. This model has been updated with a more accommodating forefoot fit while reducing the number of overlays around the forefoot without sacrificing durability. Lastly, the outsole is also more durable, incorporating a traction pattern that's been improved with re-engineered lugs under the heel. All of these updates make the new GEL-VENTURE 8 MT shoe an excellent companion for your next adventure.
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole
Mid-Top design for improved ankle support:
GEL Technology: Cushioning provides excellent shock absorption
Re-engineered outsole lugs for better off-road traction:
GEL Technology - Cushioning provides excellent shock absorption

reviews.title: Not sure if my feet grew... :)
reviews.text: I'm 55 and normally wear a 11.5 regular so that's what I ordered. My toes were super scrunched up and hitting the tip of the shoe, so I had to return them and order a half size up. They seem narrow in the front to me. Aside from that IMO they look better in the pics than in person but for the price I'm not going to complain too much. Seems like a solid shoe otherwise. The inserts seem to be glued in which is a bummer because I use orthotic inserts especially in my running shoes.

reviews.title: Who'd,thunk....these could be so comfortable
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics for several years now and have been pleased. They do not last very long but they are comfortable and at about $50 per pair (always buy on sale) it is much cheaper then other name brands. I thought I would try the mid tops as I used to wear hightops in my early years. I am glad I did, they are very comfortable. So good that I just ordered a second pair (grey) as soon as I tried these coffee (brown) ones on. The grey ones are on sale for just $40 so its a no-brainer.

reviews.title: High top Asics
reviews.text: I've worn Asics for ever and was actually skeptical about buying since other reviewers that where Asics gave poor reviews. Well, in glad I bought them. I have always wanted Asics to make a high top and they finally did. These will make great trail shoes. I'm returning a pair of Merrells that didn't fit like old Merrells did. The Asics have built in stability for people with high arches. They are lightweight,  comfortable and fit like good shoes should. Asics didn't drop the bar as others complained, looks like the same high quality at reasonable prices they are known for.

reviews.title: Fits like a glove
reviews.text: Great shoe. Fits perfectly

reviews.title: Very Nice Quality for the Price
reviews.text: Fits perfectly.  Very easy to get on and off. So far, the soles appear to be wearing well. I walk on concrete and so far do not notice any appreciable wear.

title: Nike womens Running Shoes
description: The Nike Odyssey React Flyknit 2 Women's Running Shoe delivers a strategic combination of lightweight Flyknit and synthetic material for support just where you need it. Underfoot, Nike React cushioning delivers a soft, springy ride for a route that begs to be crushed.
features: 100 % Cotton

reviews.title: Too tight

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Very light and comfy.

reviews.title: very comfortable
reviews.text: I love New Balance tennis shoes.  They seem to fit my feet so well.  My last pair was well worn out, so I searched on Amazon to find a new pair.  I found these and the price was so good that I ordered them.  They fit perfectly and I love them.  So cozy to wear.

title: Avia Avi Factor Slip On Girls' Sneakers - Lightweight Tennis, Athletic, Running Shoes for Girls - Toddler, Little Kid, and Big Kid Sizes 11 to 6
features: Rubber sole
PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

SLIP ON, NO TIE LACES ALTERNATIVE CLOSURE - Gore, bungee, or toggle lace closures with no tying makes an easy, fast on and off option for toddlers, preschoolers, and kids of all ages. The perfect camp, sports, everyday, or back to school shoes! Available in sizes toddler 10 to big kid 6.
COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.

reviews.title: Great little athletic shoes
reviews.text: My daughter, age 5, wears a size 13(kid) and has a wide foot. These shoes fit nicely. I like that there isn't any velcro. Velcro never holds up well and everything gets stuck to it. These shoes are closer to the shoes that we'll be buying in the near future once my daughter masters tying laces. Highly recommend these shoes.

reviews.title: Pretty and comfortable but looked worn very quickly
reviews.text: My granddaughter loved these shoes - she loved the colors and the fit -  but they wore out in a matter of a few weeks.

reviews.title: True Size Fit
reviews.text: These girl's tennis shoes are so cute! They're also pretty comfortable. The slip-on feature is easy and the shoes stay on. Traction is good. They are true size fit. And they're very affordable.

reviews.title: Pretty
reviews.text:
They liked the rainbow sneakers. These sneakers were good. She could run in them without a problem.
These shoes are very nice. They were cute for my child. They thought they were comfortable. The fit was fine. They were able to use it for different situations. They were easy to put on and off. The quality seemed fine. They looked good on her. She liked them. The deal was fine. I would recommend them.

reviews.title: Comfortable

reviews.title: Cute and well made but size was inaccurate.
reviews.text: These seem to be very good quality, especially considering how reasonable they were in price, and are super cute in person!  However, I ordered an 8T and what I received must be a kids 8.  They are huge and will not work for my kiddos this summer as I had hoped.  I'll probably just hang on to them for use down the road, but unfortunately it won't be for awhile! Photo is comparison of this shoe to my kiddos other size 8T tennis shoes we just bought.

reviews.title: Kid & mother approved
reviews.text: My daughter absolutely loves these she says they are very comfortable, they look adorable also and seem to be very well made.
